<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <meta name="description" content="Broader Frontiers Capital — Africa's premium investment platform. Stocks, ETFs, real estate, regulated crypto and more. Starting from ₦30,000."/>
  <meta property="og:title" content="Broader Frontiers Capital | Grow Wealth Across Frontiers"/>
  <meta property="og:description" content="Premium diversified investments starting from ₦30,000. 9 tiers. Multi-currency. SEC/CBN aligned."/>
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#0F2951"/>
  <title>Broader Frontiers Capital | Grow Wealth Across Frontiers</title>
  <link rel="icon" type="image/jpeg" href="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/>

  <!-- Tailwind CDN intentionally removed. Every class used in this file
       (btn-gold, card, tier-card, glass, section-title, etc.) is our own
       custom CSS defined below — zero Tailwind utility classes are used
       anywhere in the markup. The Tailwind Play CDN bundles a JIT compiler
       built for evergreen browsers and uses modern ES2020+ syntax
       internally, which crashed older Android WebViews with
       "Unexpected token '?'" purely from being parsed — even though we
       never called anything from it. Removing it fixes the crash and
       cuts page weight with no visual change. -->
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,600;0,700;1,600&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>
  <!-- Firebase and Flutterwave are BOTH loaded dynamically at runtime
       (see bottom of <body>), not here. No external <script src> tag
       runs synchronously during initial page parse. This guarantees
       the page's own HTML/CSS/JS — which is 100% plain ES5 — always
       renders and works fully, even in the worst case where a
       third-party SDK bundle turns out to be incompatible with an
       older WebView. Firebase-dependent features (persistent login,
       balance sync) degrade gracefully if Firebase fails to load;
       the onboarding + payment flow keeps working either way. -->

  <style>
    :root{
      --navy:#0F2951; --navydk:#071A33; --navymd:#1A3F6F;
      --gold:#C8A84B;  --goldlt:#E8C96A; --golddk:#A07830;
      --teal:#0D9488;  --green:#16A34A;  --red:#DC2626;
      --slate:#F1F5F9; --border:#CBD5E1; --text:#0F172A; --muted:#64748B;
    }
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
    html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
    body{font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;background:#F8FAFC;color:#0F172A;overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;}

    /* Scrollbar */
    ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px;}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#F1F5F9;}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#CBD5E1;border-radius:3px;}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:#94A3B8;}

    /* Keyframes */
    @keyframes pulse2{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:.4;transform:scale(.85)}}
    @keyframes ticker{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(-50%)}}
    @keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
    @keyframes shimmerGold{0%{background-position:-200% 0}100%{background-position:200% 0}}
    @keyframes gradShift{0%,100%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}}

    .live-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#22C55E;animation:pulse2 2s infinite;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(34,197,94,.2);}
    .ticker-track{animation:ticker 50s linear infinite;display:flex;gap:64px;white-space:nowrap;width:max-content;}
    .ticker-track:hover{animation-play-state:paused;}

    /* Gradient text */
    .text-gradient{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#C8A84B 0%,#E8C96A 40%,#0D9488 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;}
    .text-gradient-light{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff 0%,#E8C96A 60%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;}

    /* Nav */
    #nav{transition:all .3s ease;border-bottom:1px solid transparent;}
    #nav.scrolled{background:rgba(7,26,51,.97)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(24px);border-bottom-color:rgba(200,168,75,.2);}

    /* Buttons */
    .btn-gold{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#C8A84B,#A07830);color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-weight:700;transition:all .25s;letter-spacing:.3px;}
    .btn-gold:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#DFC078,#C8A84B);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(200,168,75,.35);}
    .btn-navy{background:#0F2951;color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-weight:700;transition:all .25s;}
    .btn-navy:hover{background:#1A3F6F;transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(15,41,81,.3);}
    .btn-outline-gold{background:transparent;color:#C8A84B;border:2px solid #C8A84B;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-weight:600;transition:all .25s;}
    .btn-outline-gold:hover{background:#C8A84B;color:#fff;}
    .btn-outline-white{background:transparent;color:#fff;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.35);cursor:pointer;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-weight:600;transition:all .25s;}
    .btn-outline-white:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);}

    /* Cards */
    .card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #E2E8F0;border-radius:16px;transition:all .3s ease;}
    .card:hover{border-color:#C8A84B;box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(15,41,81,.1);transform:translateY(-4px);}
    .card-dark{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:16px;transition:all .3s ease;}
    .card-dark:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-color:rgba(200,168,75,.35);}

    /* Tier card */
    .tier-card{background:#fff;border:2px solid #E2E8F0;border-radius:20px;padding:28px 24px;position:relative;transition:all .3s ease;cursor:default;}
    .tier-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:0 24px 64px rgba(15,41,81,.13);}

    /* Section */
    .section-label{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#C8A84B;margin-bottom:12px;}
    .section-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',Georgia,serif;font-weight:700;line-height:1.12;color:#0F172A;}
    .section-title-light{font-family:'Playfair Display',Georgia,serif;font-weight:700;line-height:1.12;color:#fff;}
    .section-sub{font-size:15px;line-height:1.8;color:#64748B;max-width:520px;margin:0 auto;}

    /* Glass */
    .glass{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);}
    .glass-gold{background:rgba(200,168,75,.08);border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.2);}

    /* Orb */
    .orb{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(90px);pointer-events:none;}

    /* Grid bg */
    .grid-bg{background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(200,168,75,.04) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(200,168,75,.04) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:72px 72px;}

    /* FAQ */
    .faq-body{max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height .4s ease,padding .3s ease;}
    .faq-body.open{max-height:400px;}
    .faq-icon{transition:transform .3s;display:inline-block;}
    .faq-icon.open{transform:rotate(45deg);}

    /* Reveal */
    .reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);transition:opacity .65s ease,transform .65s ease;}
    .reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:none;}

    /* Input */
    .inp{width:100%;background:#F8FAFC;border:1.5px solid #CBD5E1;border-radius:12px;padding:13px 16px;font-size:14px;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;color:#0F172A;transition:border .2s;outline:none;}
    .inp:focus{border-color:#0F2951;background:#fff;}
    .inp::placeholder{color:#94A3B8;}

    /* Modal overlay */
    .modal-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(7,26,51,.7);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);z-index:500;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;}
    .modal-overlay.open{display:flex;}

    /* Step indicator */
    .step-dot{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;transition:all .3s;}

    /* Progress bar */
    .prog-track{height:6px;background:#E2E8F0;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;}
    .prog-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:width .6s ease;}

    /* Tag */
    .tag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;}

    @media(max-width:768px){
      .hide-mobile{display:none!important;}
      .tier-card:hover{transform:none;}
      .card:hover{transform:none;}
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="page-home">

<!-- ═══ MARKET TICKER ═══ -->
<div style="background:#071A33;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.18);padding:7px 0;overflow:hidden;">
  <div class="ticker-track" style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11.5px;">
    <span style="color:#22C55E;">NGN/USD ₦1,580</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#22C55E;">BTC $67,420 ▲1.8%</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#22C55E;">ETH $3,540 ▲2.2%</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#E8C96A;">NGX ASI ▲0.6%</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#22C55E;">Gold $2,318/oz ▲0.3%</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#F87171;">Brent $87.4/bbl ▼0.2%</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#22C55E;">S&amp;P 500 ▲0.4%</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#22C55E;">NGN/GBP ₦2,010</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#22C55E;">Dangote Cement ▲0.9%</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#22C55E;">MSFT ▲0.8%</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#22C55E;">Airtel Africa ▲1.3%</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#F87171;">NGN/EUR ₦1,720</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <!-- repeat -->
    <span style="color:#22C55E;">NGN/USD ₦1,580</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#22C55E;">BTC $67,420 ▲1.8%</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#22C55E;">ETH $3,540 ▲2.2%</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#E8C96A;">NGX ASI ▲0.6%</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#22C55E;">Gold $2,318/oz ▲0.3%</span><span style="color:#94A3B8;">•</span>
    <span style="color:#F87171;">Brent $87.4/bbl ▼0.2%</span><span style="col
